text: Preheat the oven to 425°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or lightly oil it.
Mix {{gluten_free_bread_crumbs}}, {{salt_chicken}}, {{onion_powder}}, and {{garlic_powder_chicken}} in a shallow bowl.
Dip or roll {{chicken}} in {{olive_oil}}, then roll the chicken in the bread crumb mixture to coat.
Spread the coated chicken on the prepared baking sheet and bake for 10–14 minutes, until cooked through.
Put {{mango}}, {{coconut_cream}}, {{lemon_juice}}, {{garlic_powder_dressing}}, {{ginger}}, and {{sea_salt}} in a blender and blend until smooth.
Layer {{salad_mix}} in bowls with the mango dressing and crispy chicken, then serve.
